description: Canonical rg queries per data-pattern tag. Run by cross-shard-audit.py at converge when colony plan declares ≥2 shards with overlapping tags. v2.5 §25.11.

queries.name: cache_keyed_by_str_only
queries.remediation: Re-key by (workspace_id, idempotency_key) tuple; e.g. dict[tuple[UUID, str], tuple[UUID, datetime]]

queries.name: tenant_scoped_tuple_key
queries.remediation: Cache type annotation must declare a tuple key. If using dict[str, ...] the tenant scoping is missing.

queries.name: async_write_without_lock
queries.remediation: Wrap the read-check-write window with `async with <lock>:`. TOCTOU race exists otherwise.

cache.description: Generic in-memory caches in async routes

queries.name: module_level_dict_cache_no_eviction
queries.remediation: Module-level dict caches grow unbounded. Add an eviction helper invoked on each write or via a periodic GC.

queries.name: lock_declared_but_unused
queries.remediation: Lock declared but no `async with` usage found. Either use it or remove it.

auth.description: workspace_id derived from auth/query, not body alone

queries.name: body_only_workspace_id_in_route_handler
queries.remediation: Route uses request.workspace_id but does not validate it against a query/auth-derived workspace_id. Add WorkspaceIdQuery dependency + 400 on mismatch.

queries.name: rate_bucket_keyed_by_str_only
queries.remediation: Rate-limit buckets must scope by (workspace_id, identifier) to prevent cross-tenant blast radius.

validation-guard.description: Pydantic models with strict extra='forbid' on production routes

queries.name: production_request_model_extra_ignore_default
queries.remediation: INFO: BaseModel without extra='forbid' silently drops misnamed fields. Acceptable for forwards-compat; evaluate per-route.

multi-tenant-key.description: Generic tenant-scoping discipline across data structures

queries.name: dict_key_workspace_aware
queries.remediation: INFO: dict[str, ...] at module level may need tenant scoping. Review the key semantics.
